# Pillar & Frame

> A story-led film studio in Ohio. The Trust Engine: real stories captured on film, turned into a system of assets, put to work on LinkedIn and Google Business Profiles. Plus systems coaching for the CRM and follow-up businesses already pay for.

## Services
- The Trust Engine (three tiers: DIY software $149/mo, Onsite filming day $6,000, Full library $12,000): https://pillarandframe.com/trust-engine
- Systems Coaching (audit, then coaching inside GoHighLevel and similar tools): https://pillarandframe.com/systems-coaching

## Proof
- Case studies: https://pillarandframe.com/work (Frontier Technologies, Memorial Health, DG Lending, Wealthstrong)

## Book
- Free 30-minute strategy call, written report in 48 hours: https://pillarandframe.com/book

City Spotlight Ohio (https://cityspotlightohio.com) is a Pillar & Frame project.
